title: Blaze Rod Crafting
description: Adds a simple recipe to craft blaze rods without going to the nether.
body:
A simple mod that adds a new recipe for blaze rods so that you don't have to go to the Nether to get them. Ideal for modpacks and servers where the Nether is disabled. Feel free to use this anywhere as long as you give credit.

![Crafting a blaze rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6a5b2fe37cc404e196733fae5bdf6018f97702f.png)
